emails.subject: Enron On Line Demo
emails.body: Enron On Line Demo Tom Engel will conduct the demonstration for Bill LaFuze and Peter Mims on Wednesday at 2:15 p.m.. I will meet Bill and Peter at 2 p.m. and escort them to the new building. Tom Engel will do sample trades and answer any questions they have. Do you want to participate? Thanks.

emails.subject: RE: Enron On Line Demo
emails.body: RE: Enron On Line Demo Is there any way that we can move this to 3? I have a meeting from 1:30-2:30. Or just move it back 30 min. To: Sanders, Richard B.

emails.subject: RE: Enron On Line Demo
emails.body: Sure. I'll let them know... To: Goode, Diane
